use_cases: Display status labels in dashboards and admin panels
Show category or tag information on content items
Present user roles or permission levels in interface
Mark items as featured, new, or featured in listings
ai_summary: A flexible badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) that renders as a rounded pill with customizable text. Supports hover color transitions and focus ring states for accessibility. Built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS using the class-variance-authority pattern for variant management.
